# Reactor Analysis {#sec-ch5}

add context.

## Qualitative Reactor Analysis {#sec-ch5_qual_analysis}

to be added.

## Quantitative Reactor Analysis {#sec-ch5_quant_analysis}

include 
* choosing and simplifying the necessary balance equations for modeling a given reactor
* specification, optimization, design, and parameter estimation tasks

## Assignment Completion Workflow {#sec-ch5_assmt_workflow}

include
* assignment summary
* deliverables and computational strategy
* reactor model(s)
* other equipment model(s)
* experiment model
* numerical implementation
* results and discussion
* assignment fulfillment

## Heating and Cooling Reactors {#sec-ch5_heat_cool_reactors}

to be added.
